bird.name: Tanimbar boobook
bird.summary: The Tanimbar boobook, or Tanimbar hawk-owl (Ninox forbesi), is a species of owl in the family Strigidae. It is found in the Tanimbar Island…

locations.name: 印度尼西亚
locations.summary: 印度尼西亞共和国（印尼語：Republik Indonesia，IPA讀音：[rɛpʊblɪk ɪndɔnɛsɪa]），通稱印度尼西亞，簡稱印尼，是位于东南亚的群岛国家；由17,506個岛屿组成，是世界上最大的群島國家，疆域橫跨亞洲及大洋…
